SHORT NAME: OTHR_TP_CLCTN_CD 

LONG NAME: OTHR_TP_CLCTN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: 000 = Not applicable 
001 = Third-Party Resource is Casualty/Tort 
002 = Third-Party Resource is Estate 
003 = Third-Party Resource is Lien (Tax Equity and Fiscal Responsibility Act of 1982 (TEFRA)) 
004 = Third-Party Resource is Lien
